subject: Reminder: Introduction to Scale Out-Of-The-Box Bandwidth - Assignment 1 Deadline
body:
Hello Students,

This is a quick reminder that Assignment 1 for Introduction to Scale Out-Of-The-Box Bandwidth is due on Sunday, July 05 at 06:56 UTC.

Please submit your work in PDF format via the student portal. Late submissions will be penalized by 10% per day. Ensure that you run your code and include all required graphs before final submission.

If you have questions, office hours are tomorrow from 2-4 PM.

Regards,
Prof. Bennett
